change: from_qualified_base64: single get_sizage() (was 6 matches incl. frame_size_of); inline fs computation (drop frame_size_of re-parse + redundant soft UTF-8 scan); replace PAD.repeat(xs) String alloc with byte check
asi: decode hot path was dominated by repeated ~110-variant get_sizage() match. fixed codes (ed25519n, blake3_256) return fs immediately from sizage.fs(), so most of the win is the match collapse + avoiding frame_size_of's re-parse. qb2 convert metrics also dropped ~11-12% but share NO code with this fn -> criterion variance, not causal.
